details.question: How many PTO days do new full-time employees receive annually?
details.answer: New full-time employees receive 15 PTO days annually, accrued on a bi-weekly basis starting from their hire date. [pto-policy: PTO Accrual for New Employees]

citations.title: Pto Policy
citations.snippet: New full-time employees receive **15 PTO days annually**, accrued on a bi-weekly basis starting from their hire date. During the first year of employment, employees may use PTO as it accrues. Part-tim...

details.question: How many unused PTO days can employees carry over to the next year?
details.answer: Employees may carry over up to 5 unused PTO days into the next calendar year. [pto-policy: PTO Carryover]

citations.title: Pto Policy
citations.snippet: Employees may carry over up to **5 unused PTO days** into the next calendar year. Any PTO balance exceeding 5 days on December 31 will be forfeited unless state law requires otherwise. Carried-over PT...

details.question: How many sick days do employees receive per year?
details.answer: Employees receive 5 sick days per year. [pto-policy: Sick Leave]

citations.title: Pto Policy
citations.snippet: In addition to PTO, employees receive **5 sick days** per year for personal illness or medical appointments. Sick days do not carry over and are separate from PTO. Employees may not use sick days for ...

details.question: How many days per week must hybrid employees work in the office?
details.answer: Hybrid employees must work 3 days per week in the office. [remote-work-policy: Hybrid Schedule]
details.gold_answer: 3 days per week in the office

citations.title: Remote Work Policy
citations.snippet: The standard hybrid schedule requires employees to work **3 days per week in the office** (Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday) and up to 2 days remotely (Monday and Friday). Departments may adjust core in-o...

details.question: What is the home office stipend for eligible full remote employees?
details.answer: The home office stipend for eligible full remote employees is $500. [equipment-byod: Home Office Equipment]

citations.title: Equipment Byod
citations.snippet: Full remote employees receive a **$500 one-time stipend** for home office setup (see Remote Work Policy). Stipend-eligible items include desk, chair, monitor stand, and ergonomic accessories. Receipts...

details.question: How long is the probationary period before employees are eligible for remote work?
details.answer: The probationary period is 90 days before employees are eligible to request remote or hybrid work arrangements. [remote-work-policy: Eligibility]

citations.title: Remote Work Policy
citations.snippet: All full-time employees who have completed their **90-day probationary period** are eligible to request remote or hybrid work arrangements. New hires may work remotely only with written director appro...

details.question: What is the daily meal allowance while traveling?
details.answer: The daily meal allowance while traveling is $75 per day. [expense-reimbursement: Meals During Travel]

citations.title: Expense Reimbursement
citations.snippet: Daily meal allowance while traveling is **$75** per day. Alcohol is not reimbursable unless entertaining approved clients with prior manager approval.

details.question: Within how many days must expenses be submitted for reimbursement?
details.answer: Expenses must be submitted within 30 days of incurring the expense. [expense-reimbursement: General Guidelines]

citations.title: Expense Reimbursement
citations.snippet: Employees must obtain pre-approval for any single expense exceeding **$500**. All expenses must be submitted within **30 days** of incurring the expense via the Concur expense system. Receipts are req...

details.question: What is the minimum password length required?
details.answer: The minimum password length required is 14 characters. [information-security: Password Requirements]

citations.title: Information Security
citations.snippet:
All employees must use passwords that meet the following criteria:
- Minimum **14 characters**
- At least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character
- Passwords ...

details.question: How quickly must security incidents be reported?
details.answer: Security incidents must be reported within 1 hour of discovery. [information-security: Incident Reporting]

citations.title: Information Security
citations.snippet: Security incidents must be reported to the Security Operations Center (SOC) within **1 hour** of discovery via the incident hotline (1-800-NEXUS-SOC) or security@nexustech.com. Failure to report incid...

details.question: Is multi-factor authentication mandatory for all employees?
details.answer: Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all employees accessing company systems. [doc_id: information-security | Section: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)]
details.gold_answer: MFA is mandatory for all employees

citations.title: Information Security
citations.snippet: MFA is **mandatory** for all employees accessing company systems, including email, VPN, cloud services, and source code repositories. Approved MFA methods include hardware security keys (preferred), a...

details.question: What is the maximum value of gifts employees may accept from business partners?
details.answer: The maximum value of gifts employees may accept from business partners is $50 or less. [code-of-conduct: Gifts and Entertainment]

citations.title: Code Of Conduct
citations.snippet: Employees may accept gifts valued at **$50 or less** from business partners. Gifts exceeding $50 must be declined or approved by a director. Cash gifts are never acceptable regardless of amount.

details.question: What percentage of employee medical premium does the company pay?
details.answer: The company pays 80% of employee premium costs. [doc_id: benefits-overview | Section: Health Insurance]

citations.title: Benefits Overview
citations.snippet: Nexus Technologies offers medical, dental, and vision insurance through BlueCross Premier. The company pays **80% of employee premium** costs and **60% of dependent premium** costs.

details.question: What is the 401(k) company match percentage?
details.answer: The 401(k) company match percentage is 4% on employee contributions up to 6% of salary [doc_id: benefits-overview | Section: Retirement Benefits]

citations.title: Benefits Overview
citations.snippet: Nexus Technologies offers a 401(k) plan with **4% company match** on employee contributions up to 6% of salary. Employees are eligible for the match after **90 days** of employment. Vesting schedule: ...

details.question: How many paid company holidays does Nexus Technologies observe?
details.answer: Nexus Technologies observes 10 paid company holidays. [doc_id: holiday-calendar | Section: Paid Holidays]

citations.title: Holiday Calendar
citations.snippet: Nexus Technologies observes the following **10 paid company holidays** in 2025. Full-time employees receive holiday pay; part-time employees receive prorated holiday pay based on their schedule.

details.question: How often do performance reviews occur?
details.answer: Performance reviews occur twice per year. [doc_id: performance-reviews | Section: Review Cycle]

details.question: How often are laptops refreshed?
details.answer: Laptops are refreshed every 3 years or sooner if damaged beyond repair. [equipment-byod: Equipment Lifecycle]

citations.title: Equipment Byod

details.question: What is the Ethics Hotline number for reporting harassment?
details.answer: The Ethics Hotline number for reporting harassment is 1-888-NEXUS-ETHICS. [code-of-conduct: Reporting Procedures]
